body_transformation: The curled spiral tail tip now glows with deep shadow violet energy, its flame replaced by jagged, tattered shadow fur that extends into the tip. Wing membranes shift to charcoal gray with obsidian silver veins tracing their edges, appearing slightly translucent and tattered at the corners. The robust body adopts a matte black base with subtle ebony crimson highlights along the shoulder ridges and neck. Skin texture becomes roughened shadow fur with spiky patterns along the spine, while the rounded head retains its shape but features narrow, menacing eyes set within shadowed sockets.
signature_feature: Tail tip: jagged shadow fur with tattered edges and deep shadow violet luminescence.
